title: Morning Hydration
description: Drink 500ml of water right after waking up.

title: Read 10 Pages
description: Read a non-fiction or personal development book.

title: Code for 1 Hour
description: Practice JavaScript or learn a new framework.

title: Daily Walk
description: Walk outside for at least 20 minutes.

title: Meditation
description: Sit in silence and focus on your breath for 10 minutes.

title: Journaling
description: Write down 3 things you are grateful for.

title: Zero Screen Time
description: No screens 1 hour before going to bed.

title: Review Finances
description: Log your daily expenses and check your budget.

title: Learn a Word
description: Learn a new word in English and use it in a sentence.

title: Healthy Meal
description: Cook at least one full meal with whole ingredients.

title: Connect
description: Text or call a family member or friend.

title: Listen to a Podcast
description: Listen to an educational or tech podcast.

title: Plan Tomorrow
description: Write down your top 3 tasks for the next day.
